title: croton ortholobus
intro: Croton ortholobus, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Croton ortholobus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like croton oil and limonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and wounds. Croton ortholobus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
